reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención, los servicios exclusivos para socios te dan la oportunidad de poder disfrutar de mucha sombra, agua caliente, excelentes sanitarios y muy buenos servicios para el auto.

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent, and the exclusive member services give you the opportunity to enjoy plenty of shade, hot water, excellent restrooms, and very good car services.

reviews.comment:
el service un desastre, no respeta los turnos,  trato poco gentil, te hace ir 20 veces por errores que cometen... cambien el personal porque deja mal parado al ACA.

(Translated by Google)
The service is a disaster, they don't respect shifts, they're rude, they make you go back 20 times because of mistakes they make... they should change the staff because it leaves ACA in a bad light.
